# Ilewa

> The property marketplace Lagos deserves — verified listings, agents who respond, every naira receipted.

## About
Ilewa is a Nigerian property marketplace launching in Lagos. We connect renters with verified property listings and certified agents, with transparent on-platform payments. Every listing is checked before it goes live. Every transaction is receipted.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage / Waitlist](https://ilewa.co): Join the waitlist for early access as an "Ilewa General"

## What We Solve
- Fake listings and misleading property photos in Lagos
- Agents who ghost after collecting inspection fees
- No receipts or payment records for rent transactions
- Scattered communication across WhatsApp groups and DMs

## Contact
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@ilewa
